channel.title: Fundamentals on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Fundamentals on Tech Tracker

item.title: Juno network stakeholders violates fundamentals of crypto currency.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-7-fOM3K6A9U/YjIeuPy9NfI/AAAAAAAAJtE/7sAEMdMU_bAPG3XCwZGBG5clJ6rcicX6QCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1647451829653745-0.png" alt=""> Juno network stakeholders for the first time voilates the fundamentals of crypto currency by voting a proposal to rug pull funds of whale wallet who gambled juno Airdrop by creating 51 wallets instead 1, eventhough there is no written rules from juno network which states that a person shouldn’t create multiple wallets to join airdrop but still Juno network created a proposal to rug pull the funds of whale’s wallet and interestingly proposal is passed and juno stakeholders are excited to see what’s gonna happen in future.
